top_signals.title: Ruble Tops Global Currencies as Putin Reaps Iran War Oil Gain
top_signals.summary: Russia’s ruble has muscled its way to become the world’s best performer against the dollar so far this quarter, buoyed by a surge in foreign currency receipts from oil sales following the outbreak of war in the Middle East.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ACS Drops on €2.1 Billion Share Sale to Fund Data Centers
top_signals.summary: ACS Actividades de Construcción y Servicios SA shares declined after the Spanish company sold about a 6% stake to fund data centers and other AI-related infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SEC’s innovation exemption for tokenized stocks to come as early as this week: Bloomberg
top_signals.summary: The SEC has approved several entities to move forward with tokenized stock initiatives, including the NYSE and Nasdaq.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
